name: Supply Chain Dependency Risk Assessment
description: Automated supply chain risk assessment for new or updated third-party dependencies. When a new package is introduced or an existing one is updated, Riggs AI evaluates the package reputation, maintainer trustworthiness, typosquatting risk, and known malicious indicators. Suspicious packages are blocked and flagged for security review.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Block merging of PRs that introduce suspicious dependencies

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Alert security team about suspicious or malicious supply chain packages

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create investigation tickets for suspicious packages requiring manual review

data.title: New/Updated Dependency Detected
data.summary: Triggers when a new package is added or an existing dependency is updated

config.description: Monitors for new or updated dependencies in package manifests (package.json, requirements.txt, pom.xml, go.mod)

data.title: AI Supply Chain Risk Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates the package reputation, maintainer trust, and risk signals

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate the package for supply chain risk: check maintainer reputation and history, package age and download count, whether the name resembles a popular package (typosquatting), presence of install scripts or obfuscated code, recent maintainer changes, and known security advisories. Flag dependency confusion risks.
config.description: AI-powered supply chain risk assessment for third-party packages

data.title: Malicious or Highly Suspicious?
data.summary: Check if the package is flagged as malicious or highly suspicious

data.title: Block Package / Reject PR
data.summary: Block the suspicious package from being merged into the codebase

config.description: Block the PR that introduces the suspicious dependency

data.title: Alert Security Team
data.summary: Notify the security team about the suspicious supply chain package

data.title: Create Investigation Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for the security team to investigate the suspicious package

config.description: Create an investigation ticket for the suspicious supply chain package

data.title: Moderate Risk?
data.summary: Check if the package has moderate risk signals warranting a note

data.title: Add PR Review Comment
data.summary: Add a review comment to the PR noting moderate supply chain risk

config.description: Add a review comment to the PR with supply chain risk information

data.title: Approve — Low Risk
data.summary: Package assessed as low risk — no action needed

config.note: Package {{trigger-1.alert.package_name}}@{{trigger-1.alert.package_version}} passed supply chain risk assessment. Risk score: {{analyze-1.result.risk_score}}/100.

config.summary: Supply chain dependency risk assessment complete.
